CE1.justification: Acted directly with no clarifying questions; user did not have to look anything up.

CE2.justification: One tight paragraph; verdict, checklist path, MISSING items, and the flip condition, no padding.

CE3.justification: Names the checklist path inline and gives the reason for each MISSING flag in one clause.

CE4.justification: Checklist is the load-bearing artifact, but a daybook entry was also opened — one extra in-progress artifact for a single-task scenario.
